title: Capitol Civic Code
summary: Establishes civic obligations and public order requirements.
text: The Capitol Civic Code governs civic conduct, public order, and administrative compliance throughout Panem.

history.note: Initial issue under delegated District authority.

title: Public Order Preservation Act
summary: Provides enforcement mechanisms to preserve order and security.
text: This Act provides the state with powers necessary to preserve public order and prevent disorder.

history.note: Initial issue under delegated District authority.
